name: Grilled Spinach and Pesto Filled Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 9 ounce pkg frozen spinach, thawed, squeezed dry
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat grill.
2. Cut tomatoes in half crosswise.
3. Hollow out tomato halves, leaving a 1/4 inch shell. Discard centers or use in soup.
4. In a medium bowl, combine spinach, 1/2 cup of the cheese, onions, and pesto. Mix well.
5. Spoon mixture into tomato halves.
6. When ready to grill, place filled tomatoes on gas grill over Medium-Low heat or on charcoal grill 4-6 inches from Medium-Low coals.
7. Cook for 20-30 minutes or until well heated.
8. During the last 1-2 minutes of cooking, sprinkle remaining 1/4 cup cheese over top. Continue cooking until cheese is melted.
Oven Directions:
1. Heat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare recipe as directed above.
3. Place filled tomatoes in a 12x8 inches baking dish.
4. Bake at 350°F for 20-30 minutes or until well heated.
5. During the last 1-2 minutes of cooking, sprinkle remaining 1/4 cup cheese over tops. Continue cooking until cheese is melted.
